title: Digisonde
short description: Digisondes are ionosondes that use pulsed signal that can gather more radar information than a traditional ionosonde sweep.
description:
Digisondes are ionosondes that use pulsed signal that can gather more radar information than a traditional ionosonde sweep. It is sometimes called "The Grinder" by amateur operators.

The specifications of the Digisonde transmitters can be found here on the [manufacture's website](https://www.digisonde.com/digisonde.html#features-section). A map of all the Digisonde locations can be found on their [main page](https://www.digisonde.com/index.html).
